base.name: UT Austin

toefl.note: TOEFL iBT score of 79+ required (traditional 0–120 scale). ETS institution code: 6882. For exams taken on or after Jan 21, 2026 (new scale), contact UT Austin admissions for the equivalent minimum.

ielts.note: IELTS Academic only. IELTS General Training is NOT accepted.

englishRequirement.note: TOEFL iBT 79+ or IELTS Academic 6.5+ required. Duolingo, TOEFL ITP, TOEFL Essentials, and IELTS General Training are NOT accepted. English Composition courses do NOT waive this requirement. Exemptions: graduated from U.S. high school, 10+ years U.S. residence (PR only), earned U.S. bachelor's degree, or attended a U.S. institution immediately prior to UT Austin enrollment.

base.notes: Admission to Cockrell School is competitive — evaluated holistically on GPA, technical coursework, and a 500-word essay. No published minimum GPA for external transfer; internal transfer requires 3.0+. Application deadline: December 1 (Fall admission only; no Spring). Source: cockrell.utexas.edu/admissions/undergraduate/external-transfer/

majors.name: Biomedical Engineering
majors.note: One of the most competitive majors at Cockrell. Competitive applicants typically have a near-perfect GPA in technical courses.

majors.name: Electrical & Computer Engineering
majors.note: Extremely competitive. No chemistry required for admission. A maximum of 25 semester credit hours in EE/CE transfer courses may be counted toward the ECE degree. Linear Algebra and Differential Equations are also expected for competitive applicants.

majors.name: Geosystems Engineering & Hydrogeology
majors.note: Joint program with the Jackson School of Geosciences. Geosystems applicants must select this as their first-choice major. Geology coursework is strongly recommended.

majors.name: Mechanical Engineering
majors.note: Moderately competitive. Nuclear & Radiation Engineering concentration is offered within ME — apply as ME if interested in NRE.

majors.name: Petroleum Engineering
majors.note: Geology coursework is strongly recommended for competitive applicants.
